name: FlexZone Gym
welcome_message:
Hey! 💪 Welcome to FlexZone Gym. How can I help you today?

You can ask me about:
• Membership pricing
• Timings
• Classes & trainers
• Location
• Free trial

faqs.question: Membership Pricing
faqs.response:
💰 *FlexZone Membership Plans:*

🥉 Basic — ₹999/month
   ✅ Gym access (6am–10pm)
   ✅ Locker room

🥈 Standard — ₹1,499/month
   ✅ Everything in Basic
   ✅ 2 Group classes/week
   ✅ Diet consultation

🥇 Premium — ₹2,499/month
   ✅ Everything in Standard
   ✅ Personal trainer (3x/week)
   ✅ Unlimited classes

Want to book a *free trial session*? 🎯

faqs.question: Timings
faqs.response:
⏰ *FlexZone Timings:*

📅 Monday–Saturday: 6:00 AM – 10:00 PM
📅 Sunday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM

🎄 We're open on most holidays! DM us to confirm.

faqs.question: Location
faqs.response:
📍 We're located at:
*123 Fitness Street, Andheri West, Mumbai*

Easily accessible from the Andheri Metro station (5 min walk). 🚇

faqs.question: Free Trial
faqs.response:
🎉 Great news! We offer a *FREE 1-day trial* for all new members.

No commitment, no payment — just show up and experience FlexZone! 💪

Book your spot using the link below 👇

faqs.question: Classes & Trainers
faqs.response:
🏋️ *FlexZone Classes:*

• Yoga — Mon, Wed, Fri (7am & 7pm)
• Zumba — Tue, Thu (6pm)
• CrossFit — Mon–Sat (8am)
• HIIT Cardio — Daily (6am & 7pm)

All classes included in Standard & Premium plans! 🌟
